Index.badge: Runs on your Google Drive — without storing anything
Index.title: Download any Yupoo album in seconds
Index.subtitle: Paste the album link, connect your Google Drive and you're done — all images organized in folders automatically.
Index.noCard: No credit card required to start
Index.feature1Desc: Images sent directly to your Google account. Zero server storage.
Index.feature2Desc: Each album becomes a separate folder in your Drive with the original name.
Index.feature3Desc: Submit multiple albums at once. We process them in a queue while you do something else.
Index.feature4Desc: 1 credit = 1 image. No monthly fees. Buy the package you need.

Pricing.title: Simple Pricing
Pricing.subtitle: 1 credit = 1 image downloaded. No subscriptions, no surprises.
Pricing.footer: Secure payment via Stripe · Credits never expire · Email support

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: Paste the album link and download images to Google Drive.
